From the initial position [16,12]-[19,31], moving RIGHT by 6 would give cols 18-37, and RIGHT by 7 would give cols 19-38. Neither centers at 37.5 exactly.
Hmm, let me try a different approach. What if the goal is to move the blue block to the RIGHT edge of the charcoal/magenta blocks? The right edge is col 39. If the blue block's right edge is at col 39, then it spans cols 20-39. From the initial position cols 12-31, that's RIGHT by 8.

I'm just guessing at this point. Let me try moving the blue block to be directly below the charcoal/magenta blocks. The blue block is currently at [44,16]-[47,35]. To be below the charcoal/magenta at cols 36-39, I need to move RIGHT so that the blue block includes cols 36-39.
